evals.prompt: Write a function that billboards an object so it always faces the camera but only rotates around the Y axis.
evals.expected_output: A script that captures camera position, zeros out the Y difference, and uses quat.lookAt.
expectations: Sets the Y component of the direction vector to 0 to constrain rotation
Applies the calculation in an UpdateEvent

evals.prompt: Create a logic that smoothly moves an object from point A to point B over 3 seconds using lerp.
evals.expected_output: A script tracking elapsed time and using vec3.lerp with a calculated alpha (t/duration).
expectations: Clamps alpha to [0, 1] using MathUtils.clamp or similar
Uses an UpdateEvent to update the position per frame
